que: What is the goal of clean architecture in an app?
options: To mix UI, API, and storage code together
To separate responsibilities into clear layers

que: Which layer commonly contains widgets and screens?
Which layer commonly contains repositories and API access?
What is a common purpose of a use case in clean architecture?
options: To express a domain action or business rule

que: Why can clean architecture help larger Flutter apps?
options: It can improve maintainability and testability
It removes the need for all packages
It makes every app smaller automatically

que: Which practice should you avoid with clean architecture?
options: Using repositories to separate data access
Over-engineering very small apps with unnecessary abstraction

que: What should presentation code usually avoid?
options: Directly mixing raw API and storage logic everywhere

que: Which topic is most closely related to clean architecture basics?
